cabecalho.subtitulo: Reduce your carbon footprint without changing your lifestyle

secaoUm.paragrafo: EcoPulse is a digital service that connects your daily choices with real environmental actions. Using AI and APIs integrated with apps you already use, like Google Maps, iFood, Uber, and more, EcoPulse analyzes your routines and:
secaoUm.feature-textA: Automatically calculates your carbon emissions based on your daily activities.
secaoUm.feature-textB: Suggests small habit changes that make a big environmental impact.
secaoUm.feature-textC: Offsets your emissions through tree planting, clean energy support, and automated recycling.
secaoUm.feature-textD: Turns you into a certified Green Agent with access to exclusive perks from partner companies.

step.texto: With just a few clicks, sync your apps with EcoPulse.
A fully personalized index showing the environmental impact of your choices.
Offset your emissions automatically or manually, and earn rewards for every sustainable action.
Easily share on social media with badges, goals, and challenges with friends.

testemunhas.depoimento: I never imagined it would be so easy to make a difference. I just connected my apps and boom: I’m already helping reforest the Amazon!
I turned my impact into points, got a discount at the movies, and supported a local NGO. Now *this* is the future!
I love seeing my weekly progress and competing with friends. It’s like a game… but saving the planet!

faq.pergunta: How does EcoPulse calculate my impact?
faq.resposta: We use data from connected apps and established emission models to estimate your carbon footprint.

faq.pergunta: Do I need to pay to use it?
faq.resposta: No! We offer a free plan with essential features. Paid plans provide extra benefits and greater impact.

faq.pergunta: Do my actions really make a difference?
faq.resposta: Yes! All offsets and actions are audited and tied to real projects with traceable, transparent impact.

planoInfo.paragrafoQuatro: Access to green coupons and partnerships
